body: Hi Devon, thanks for reaching out through the Crestwood Lions Track website. We received your message about the Cross Country Invitational on October 24. Bus leaves Crestwood at 6:45 AM - bring your singlet and spikes. - Coach Perry
subject: We received your message - Crestwood Lions Track

body: Hi Trey, this confirms your contact-form submission to the Crestwood Lions Track site. A coach will follow up within 24 hours. Note: today's practice is canceled due to thunderstorms; we resume tomorrow at 3:00 PM.
subject: Contact form received - Crestwood Lions Track

body: Hi Isaiah, thanks for submitting the volunteer interest form on the team site. We've logged your request and will reach out about packet pickup at Railroad Park. - Crestwood Lions Track
subject: Volunteer form received - Crestwood Lions Track

body: Hi Leon, thanks for your message through the team website's booster contact form. We've forwarded it to the booster club and someone will reply shortly. - Crestwood Lions Track
subject: We received your booster inquiry

body: Good morning Gloria, this confirms the question you sent through the Crestwood Lions Track contact form about meet schedules. The full fall schedule is attached. - Coach Perry
subject: Re: your question about the meet schedule

body: Hi Devon, your 1:1 sprint-mechanics session request from the team site is confirmed for Tuesday at 5:30 PM at Crestwood High. We'll work on block starts and drive phase.
subject: Your session request is confirmed

body: Hi Ms. Dawson, we received your RSVP form for the Crestwood Cross Country Invitational at Oak Mountain on October 24. Reply with Trey's events so we can finalize the heat sheet.
subject: RSVP received: Cross Country Invitational

body: Great work, Marcus. We saw your note on the team site - your splits at the invitational were your best yet. Full results are attached. Proud of you. - Coach Perry
subject: Re: your message - invitational results

body: Hi Sabrina, thanks for contacting Crestwood Lions Track through our website. This confirms we received your general inquiry; a coach will respond within one business day.
subject: Thanks for contacting Crestwood Lions Track

body: Hi Cameron, we received your team-site message. The Crestwood track season opener is February 13. Practices run Monday through Friday, 3:00 to 5:30 PM. - Coach Perry
subject: Re: your question - season opener Feb 13

body: Hi Greg, thanks for submitting the volunteer form. We need course marshals and packet-pickup volunteers for the November 8 Booster 5K. We'll confirm your slot shortly.
subject: Volunteer form received - Booster 5K

body: Hi Edward, this confirms the message you sent through the Crestwood Lions Track contact form. A coach will follow up about practice times this week.
subject: We received your message - Crestwood Lions Track

body: Hi Jordan, confirming your team-site request for travel details: the team bus leaves Crestwood at 6:45 AM for the Cross Country Invitational at Oak Mountain. Don't be late.
subject: Re: your travel question - bus departure

body: Hi Ms. Bell, we received your RSVP through the team site. Please join us for the Crestwood Track parent meeting to review the season schedule and travel plans. Light refreshments provided.
subject: RSVP received: parent meeting

body: Hi Darius, responding to your team-site message: your official results and splits from the invitational are now posted. Congratulations on a strong race.
subject: Re: your message - race results posted

body: Hi Terrence, thanks for your note via the contact form. Here are a few hydration and recovery tips to keep you healthy through your training. - Coach Perry
subject: Re: your message - recovery tips

body: Hi Ms. Holloway, this confirms your team-site form submission. Please return Darius's AHSAA eligibility and physical forms before the season opener on February 13.
subject: Form received - AHSAA eligibility reminder

body: Good evening Bernice, thanks for using the Crestwood Lions Track contact form. This confirms we received your question about banquet tickets; details will follow by email.
subject: We received your banquet ticket question

body: Hi Rodney, thanks for contacting Crestwood Lions Track through our website. This confirms we received your general inquiry; a coach will respond within one business day.
subject: Thanks for contacting Crestwood Lions Track

body: Hi Latoya, thank you for your gift submitted through the team site. It helps the Crestwood Track Booster Club cover meet entry fees, uniforms, and travel.
subject: Donation received - thank you for supporting Crestwood Track

body: Hi Oscar, this confirms the message you submitted through the Crestwood Lions Track contact form. A coach will follow up about the spring schedule shortly.
subject: We received your message - Crestwood Lions Track

body: Marcus, thanks for the note through our site and for chaperoning at Oak Mountain. The team finished strong - full results attached. Appreciate you. - Coach Perry
subject: Re: your message - invitational results
